# Build Your Own Personal AI Assistant App
> A complete step-by-step instruction manual for building a voice-enabled personal AI assistant app — from scratch. By Sergio M Igartua.

## Product
- Title: Build Your Own Personal AI Assistant App — A Step-by-Step Instruction Manual
- Author: Sergio M Igartua
- Format: PDF Ebook
- Price: $19 (introductory) / $29 (regular)
- URL: https://sidigital-baja.github.io/ai-assistant-guide/

## Description
This guide documents a complete, real-world build of a personal AI assistant app covering 8 phases and 32 steps. It is written for beginners — no prior coding experience required. The example build is a Bogart-inspired noir detective assistant named Bogie, but the guide supports any persona or character.

## What the guide covers
- Phase 1: AI Persona & System Prompt Design
- Phase 2: Custom Voice Creation using ElevenLabs
- Phase 3: Development Environment (Python, VS Code, API keys)
- Phase 4: Core Assistant Build (Claude API, memory, web search)
- Phase 5: Web UI with Streamlit + GitHub account setup
- Phase 6: Google Workspace Integration (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)
- Phase 7: Cloud Deployment (GitHub + Streamlit Cloud)
- Phase 8: Mobile App Setup (iPhone & Android home screen)

## What buyers build
- A fully original AI persona with custom voice
- Voice input and spoken responses via ElevenLabs
- Gmail read, send and reply with signature
- Google Calendar and Drive integration
- Live web app deployed on Streamlit Cloud
- iPhone and Android home screen progressive web app

## Tools covered
- Claude AI by Anthropic (claude.ai)
- ElevenLabs (elevenlabs.io)
- Streamlit (streamlit.io)
- GitHub and GitHub Pages
- Google Workspace APIs (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)
- Python and Visual Studio Code
